*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Surgical to Abdominal wall / Measures 4.0 cm x 2.6 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, heavy. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Abdominal wall wound site, rates 5/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Surgical surgical Abdominal wall measures 4.0 cm x 2.6 cm x 1.3 cm.
  Wound bed: 63% slough, 37% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Surgical surgical Abdominal wall — improving.
Plan: Offloading boot applied. Alginate dressing applied.
